skill.name: fal-workflow
skill.description: Generate workflow JSON files for chaining AI models
skill.summary: Create structured workflow definitions to orchestrate multiple AI models in sequence using fal.ai
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Documentation-only skill with no executable code. Static analysis produced false positives: URLs are markdown links (not network calls) and 'cryptographic algorithm' detections matched description text (not actual crypto code). No security risks identified.

content.value_statement: Build complex AI pipelines by chaining multiple models in sequence. Generate structured workflow JSON configurations for fal.ai model orchestration.
actual_capabilities: Generate workflow JSON structures for fal.ai model chaining
Define sequential AI model execution pipelines
Configure input/output mappings between model steps
Create reusable workflow templates for common patterns
Document workflow dependencies and execution order
limitations: Requires fal.ai API access and credentials

use_cases.title: Multi-Step Content Pipeline
use_cases.description: Chain text generation, image creation, and refinement models in a single automated workflow
use_cases.target_user: Content creators building automated production pipelines

use_cases.title: AI Model Testing Framework
use_cases.description: Execute the same input across multiple models and compare outputs systematically

use_cases.title: Data Processing Workflow
use_cases.description: Orchestrate models for data transformation, analysis, and visualization in sequence

prompt_templates.title: Basic Workflow Definition
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a workflow JSON file that chains two AI models: first generate text content, then create an image based on that text output.

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Model Sequence
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a workflow configuration for three sequential models: text summarization, sentiment analysis, and report generation. Map outputs to inputs between each step.

prompt_templates.title: Conditional Workflow Branching
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a workflow JSON with conditional branching: if sentiment analysis returns negative, route to apology generation model; otherwise route to thank you message model.

prompt_templates.title: Parallel Model Execution
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a workflow that runs three different image generation models in parallel from the same text prompt, then aggregates all outputs.

output_examples.input: Create a workflow for text-to-image generation
output: Workflow JSON with input node accepting text prompt
Connection mapping text output to image model input
Output node configured for image result delivery
Final output configured for translated summary

best_practices: Define clear input/output schemas for each model step to ensure compatibility
Include error handling and fallback configurations for production workflows
Document workflow purpose and each model's role for maintainability
anti_patterns: Creating circular dependencies between workflow steps
Hardcoding API credentials in workflow JSON files
Skipping validation of intermediate outputs before passing to next model

faq.question: What is fal.ai workflow JSON?
faq.answer: A structured configuration format that defines how multiple AI models execute in sequence, including input/output mappings and execution order.

faq.question: Can I use this skill without a fal.ai account?
faq.answer: You can generate workflow JSON structures, but executing the workflows requires an active fal.ai account with API access.

faq.question: How many models can I chain in one workflow?
faq.answer: fal.ai supports multiple sequential models. Practical limits depend on API rate limits and your specific use case requirements.

faq.question: Can workflows run models in parallel?
faq.answer: Yes, workflow JSON can define parallel execution branches that run simultaneously and aggregate results.

faq.question: How do I handle errors in a workflow?
faq.answer: Include error handling configurations in your workflow JSON with fallback models or termination conditions for each step.

faq.question: Is workflow JSON reusable across projects?
faq.answer: Yes, workflow configurations are portable. You can version control them and adapt for different projects with minor parameter changes.
